claims.statement: Sheaf track registry is present and drives compose order.
IMRAD section manifest binds track fragments for composition.
Coverage report and heatmap settings are configurable.
Coverage matrix JSON reflects manifest track bindings with IMRAD metadata.
Semantic gluing certificate records cross-track symbols and typed claims.
Evidence crosswalk records claim-to-artifact producer and gate bindings.
Validation dependency graph has no producer-configuration issues.
Semantic gluing graph figure is generated from dependency records.
Track-lane promotion map figure is generated from the canonical promotion matrix and Lean promotion-proof boundary.
Artifact provenance spine records hashes and configured producers for core outputs.
Artifact provenance spine records deterministic seed and config digest fields for core outputs.
Replay spine checks deterministic toy producers and matches saved artifacts.
Counterexample spine records expected-failure fixtures for promoted validation gates.
B/W/G coverage heatmap PNG is generated for the first manuscript page.
Coverage matrix JSON has zero gray cells on a clean tree.
Composed IMRAD introduction subsection exists for PDF pipeline.
Composed Methods analytical subsection exists for PDF pipeline.
Composed Results MI sweep subsection exists for PDF pipeline.
Appendix binds and composes appendix_sheaf_track_count fragment track types from the live manifest.
pymdp T-maze summary JSON records measured rollout statistics.
pymdp T-maze trace JSON records per-step beliefs and actions.
Policy comparison artifact records state and policy inference comparison rows.
Policy comparison covers exactly state and policy inference modes.
PyMDP runtime diagnostics capture known JAX warnings and no unexpected construction warnings.
Measured PyMDP policy posterior rows are normalized or explicitly unavailable with a fallback reason.
Graph-world extension summary is a real deterministic artifact.
Graph-world extension trace records deterministic per-step states.
Graph-world summary step count agrees with trace length.
Belief entropy curve figure is generated from the SI trace.
Belief trajectory GIF is generated from multi-step trace artifacts.
Discussion outlook section binds simulation and ontology tracks.
Main-body sheaf layers overview figure combines registry stack and binding heatmap.
Lean boundary includes finite graph-world reachability and policy-enumeration witnesses.
Methods sheaf section binds figure, generated layer tables, and semantic gluing signposts.
Sensitivity track records a complete deterministic toy grid.
Analytical assumption index maps every declared finite toy equation to assumptions and evidence artifacts.
Uncertainty track rows are normalized deterministic posterior summaries.
Benchmark track includes every declared toy model row.
Policy grid artifact covers the deterministic modes, horizons, and seeds.
EFE values artifact explicitly records value availability or measured fallback for every policy-comparison row.
Graph-world topology trace artifact agrees with every topology summary row.
Graph-world invariant artifact records only passing finite toy invariants.
Model-checking witness artifact finds no finite toy counterexample.
Interop artifact reports lossless GNN/JSON/ontology round-trip checks.
Lean theorem inventory contains no forbidden proof placeholders.
Lean graph-world inventory witnesses every generated toy topology.
Canonical semantic gluing certificate reports all restrictions passing.
Canonical dependency graph includes producer, track, bundle, token, claim, validator, fixture, model, ontology, figure, and copied-output edges.
Producer completeness audit finds every required artifact producer configured.
Stale-artifact report records fresh hashes for replay-safe generated artifacts.
Cross-track symbol table records no symbol-level conflicts.
Generated manuscript evidence tables are source-backed.
Manuscript token provenance maps every hydrated variable token to generated variables.
Claim-evidence audit reports every ledger claim has typed evidence, live artifact resolution, and track coverage.
Validation gate index records every promoted local gate used by the release.
Section-track status matrix records every current manuscript section and registered sheaf track cell.
Deterministic sheaf render log records only passing render and logging events.
Figure source map covers every generated figure registry entry.
Figure hash manifest records hashes for generated visual artifacts.
Visualization quality audit confirms every registered figure is rendered, source-mapped, hashed, and backed by sufficient alt-text and caption metadata.
Visualization audit identifies statistically backed figures and verifies their generated data or report sources are present.
Statistical visualization bridge crosswalk connects statistically backed figures to source artifacts, scholarship roles, sheaf tracks, and manuscript sections.
Scope boundary audit keeps current claims confined to deterministic toy artifacts.
Adversarial audit documents every known-bad row as an expected failure.
Animation delta manifest records nonzero adjacent-frame changes for the generated GIF.
Manuscript staleness report confirms resolved markdown matches current hydrated variables.
Canonical replay matrix represents every configured analysis producer with matched replay or fingerprint rows.
Canonical sensitivity sweep covers every configured finite mode, horizon, seed, topology, and lambda cell.
Canonical uncertainty summary records normalized belief and policy-posterior distributions.
Canonical counterexample matrix covers every canonical promoted track with observed expected failures.
Evidence-field index maps typed claim fields to generated artifacts used by validation gates.
Canonical model-checking witnesses record finite exhaustive checks without counterexamples.
Canonical interop round-trip checks preserve GNN, ontology, dependency, and track-scope records without shape loss.
Canonical adversarial audit documents known-bad rows and records zero known-bad rows passing.
Track improvement scope records complete promotion proof rows and future improvement rows for canonical tracks.
Track-lane matrix maps every pipeline track to sheaf fragments, producers, artifacts, manuscript consumers, typed claims, semantic restrictions, validation gates, and negative controls.
Empirical adapter remains blocked and absent from the live sheaf registry.
Release bundle manifest records every canonical deliverable source artifact before copying.
Theorem traceability matrix links Lean theorem inventory rows to finite witnesses and evidence fields.
Gate ergonomics index records every validation gate row used by the canonical release.
Artifact diffoscope rows match saved provenance hashes against live artifacts.
Proof extraction rows contain Lean theorem statements without forbidden proof tokens.
State-space catalog records finite toy state and policy spaces.
Causal ablation matrix covers the deterministic toy ablation grid.
Artifact license audit classifies all generated and source artifacts as license-safe for the public toy exemplar.
Release-notes evidence rows are backed by validation, semantic, or bundle artifacts.
Proof dependency graph links every extracted theorem to source, tactic, definitions, and finite model witnesses.
State transition table covers every reachable finite graph-world and T-maze model row with deterministic transitions.
Ablation sensitivity report joins every causal-ablation effect to sensitivity and uncertainty source artifacts.

Scholarship source matrix rederives every cited source row from live bibliography, declared manuscript citation sections, registered tracks, bound manifest sections, scope-guarded boundaries, and evidence artifacts.
Scholarship source-map figure is generated from the source matrix.
Security posture audit records enforced local controls, scoped deferred production controls, zero high-risk local gaps, and zero high-risk secret-pattern findings.
Security posture map is generated from the source-backed security posture audit.
Artifact contract index binds generated artifacts to producers, consumers, validators, claims, freshness hashes, negative controls, and copied-output parity status.
Artifact contract index records complete copied-output parity status for artifacts that participate in the release bundle.
Artifact contract map is generated from the contract index and release evidence reports.
Release attestation binds validation, bundle hash, license audit, semantic certificate, and blocked-scope status.

tracks.paper_use: Supports the narrative spine for each composed paper section.
States the finite equations, laws, and boundary assumptions used by prose claims.
Connects analytical sweeps and toy simulations to results claims.
Lists finite-model assumptions so analytical claims stay scoped.
Generates the track registry, binding matrix, and evidence crosswalk tables.
Binds pymdp traces, runtime diagnostics, and policy comparisons to methods and results.
Shows that GNN, ontology, and JSON artifacts preserve model meaning.
Documents producers, hashes, seeds, and bundle lineage for generated claims.
Shows configured producers replay and match their expected artifacts.
Records known-bad fixtures that must fail validation gates.
Documents stress cases and expected failures for sheaf-track claims.
Maps evidence fields to sections and artifacts for claim hydration.
Checks that required deliverables exist and copied outputs match or defer explicitly.
Explains the gates a reader or maintainer can rerun locally.
Compares generated and copied artifacts to surface publication drift.
Records license status for artifacts included in release surfaces.
Connects cited sources to method roles, sections, and generated evidence.
Separates enforced local controls from deferred production-security obligations.
Summarizes deterministic toy perturbations behind robustness claims.
Reports normalized uncertainty bins and summaries for finite toy analyses.
Shows compact model comparisons used to bound toy-only claims.
Checks hydrated sections against current generated artifacts and variables.
Injects registry figures into section-specific evidence blocks.
Separates proved Lean witnesses from intentionally scoped formal boundaries.
Lists model-checking witnesses for finite state-space claims.
Links theorem rows to proof dependencies and finite model witnesses.
Shows extracted theorem artifacts remain constructive and available.
Enumerates reachable states so toy models remain explicitly finite.
Summarizes deterministic perturbation effects across toy topologies.
Documents notation and round-trip status for the analytical model.
Maps local variables to ontology terms for semantic consistency.
Provides a deterministic GIF trace as optional appendix evidence.
Confirms animation frames change and support the visual trace.
Binds release-note statements to source-backed artifacts.
